name: towles-tool-app
description: Bridges Claude Code to the towles-tool desktop app: points at its loopback-HTTP MCP server (board tasks: task_list, task_status, task_create, task_delete; calendar: calendar_today, calendar_next, calendar_set) and a hook that nudges the app to refresh PR/issue data immediately after a `gh pr`/`gh issue` mutation. Requires the app to be running.
